Video.summary: With two small children at home, Anna's severe drug addiction has led her to prostituting to feed her habit. Her mother, who's had to raise the children, is terrified for her daughter's life.
Video.title: Steve Save My Daughter

Video.summary: Latoia suspects that her male-stripper boyfriend, Hurricane, is gay; Savannah thinks Windy has caused a divide in her relationship with her boyfriend; Taylor wants her one-night stand with Cowboy to turn into a long-term relationship.
Video.title: Is My Stripper Boyfriend Gay?

Video.summary: Kiki taught Kat the ropes whens he started in the strip clubs and then they became lovers. But now Kat is dumping Kiki for a man! Later Cedric is here to tell his girlfriend that he wants to join him in a threesome with his secret lover, Eric!
Video.title: Two-timers Confronted

Video.summary: Andre and Champaign’s online relationship took off, but she must admit that she’s actually a he! Shane will marry Michelle, but he’s been fulfilling his fantasy with a Dominatrix! Brandy’s wild job now involves her sister’s boyfriend!
Video.title: Trick or Treat

Video.summary: Johnny wants his girlfriend Aimee to accept his dominatrix fetish. Then, Maya comes on the show to confront her boyfriend Eric about his abusive sexual fetishes.
Video.title: Placeholder

Video.summary: Kristin and her special skill set stand in the way of Rikki's trip down the aisle; Eric did something he regrets and asks his wife to forgive him; Danielle fears that her boyfriend cheated with her cousin Qwon.
Video.title: Now That's a Mouthful

Video.summary: Kenyatta confronts a suspected home-wrecker; Corey wants to reunite with his children and their mother; Ashley wants her baby daddy's wife to get out of the way.
Video.title: Cheaters out of Chances

Video.summary: Danny plans to leave his child's mother for a stripper; Richard confesses to his fiancee that he cheated while she was locked up; Dorreon wants to put the kibosh on his relationship.
Video.title: Heartburned

Video.summary: Desiree and Kim have been dating the same man, Chango, for 6 years! Next Mark's ex-girlfriend wants him back and even lied to him and told him she was pregnant. Today she will be confronted by Mark and his new girlfriend!
Video.title: I've Had Enough…It's Over!

Video.summary: Angelica is unapologetic about sleeping with her twin's boyfriend; Makayla confronts the woman with whom her children's father hooked up; Stormy wants to take a shower with her friend Jessica.
Video.title: Steamy Sister Sex

Video.summary: Kejana’s aunt Rose moved in with her and her man Dicoy. Dicoy ended up cheating with Rose! Can Ruben get Selena to leave his best friend Scott? Eddie had a fling with transsexual Chloe, but then his girlfriend’s father found out!
Video.title: Down and Dirty Affairs

Video.summary: Nick is here to tell his soon to be wife Ashley that he's been cheating on her with two different women! Plus, Shea is here and worried sick that her husband Adam may have had a little too much fun on a recent trip the couple took together.
Video.title: Stripper Spring Fling

Video.summary: Taylor's here to reveal that he's been cheating on Jenna with another girl and her stripper cousin! Then, it's a sibling rivalry for the ages when Cody finds out that his girl Amanda has been cheating on him with his own brother Brandon!
Video.title: Your Tears Mean Nothing

Video.summary: Jada says that one lover is not enough. She wants to confront her boyfriend to tell him that there's someone else. Next Brandy's husband has moved out to be with his mistress, Rachel. Then Danielle confesses to Rashanda that she is the other woman.
Video.title: Lying Loves Confess

Video.summary: Shianne confronts the stripper she says is destroying her marriage; stripper Candy wants a threesome with her two female co-workers.
Video.title: Springer Strip Off

Video.summary: Amber confronts Shavon; Will wants to be with his cousin Tereca.
Video.title: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Image.alt: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Video.summary: Violet's baby was brutally beaten to death by a caretaker; David says his estranged wife's story did not add up after their daughter suffered severe injuries.
Video.title: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Image.alt: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Video.summary: Cynthia says her two teen daughters are sexually active and out of control. She worries their actions will lead them to an early grave.
Video.title: I'm 15 and I Love Sex

Video.summary: There is nothing more serious than allegations of child abuse, but when all the testimonies are laid out, the stories just don't add up. Steve has the lie detector results and will reveal the truth once and for all.
Video.title: I Don't Believe Your Story

Video.summary: Ashley believes her husband Michael may have molested their 3 year old son. Michael says she is making up this entire story so she can divorce him. Next, Anjail believes Dwight has been physically abusing their son.
Video.title: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Image.alt: He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends
He Makes Me Have Sex With His Friends

Video.summary: Jared says that he is positive that his wife Sarah is cheating on him and he admits to physically abusing Sarah because he says he hates being lied to. Sarah, who is pregnant, says that she's desperate to stop Jared's abusing ways.
Video.title: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Image.alt: My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me
My Kids Watch Him Hit Me

Video.summary: Chante’s daughter accused Danae of sexual abuse. Although Danae was cleared by the authorities, Chante’s mother Shelly never believed her innocence. But is Danae just covering up for her own lies? Did Chante’s mother sleep with her ex-husband?
Video.title: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Image.alt: It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!
It’s Been 8 Years, Tell the Truth!

Video.summary: Jayshanice suspects her physically abusive boyfriend of cheating.
Video.title: Scared to Death

Video.summary: Gina believes her grandson is being abused by her daughter's boyfriend. Was Gina right or is Efrain innocent?
Video.title: How Could You Cover for Him?

Image.alt: How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?
How Could You Cover for Him?

Video.summary: Derrick wants to know whether he is the father of his ex-wife's 3-year-old daughter; Aisia admits to sleeping with two men around the time her second child was conceived, and now her ex wants to know if he is her first child's father.
Video.title: Devastating DNA

Video.summary: Robert believes his daughter is being abused and molested by her stepfather, John, but John and Tiffany denies any abuse. Is Tiffany covering for John’s abuse? See the shocking lie detector test today!
Video.title: A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Image.alt: A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Video.summary: Ashley's mother is here because she says she's witnessed first hand Ashley's boyfriend Scott's abusive ways. She says that Scott has completely isolated Ashley and her grandchild from the rest of her family.
Video.title: You Want Him To Be The Father?

Image.alt: You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?
You Want Him To Be The Father?

Video.summary: Christopher had to move away for a job and his wife, Ashley, says that she won't move until he proves that he's not a cheater. Then, Tim is worried that his wife Sasha is cheating because he found Facebook messages from her ex.
Video.title: Will These Results Destroy Us

Video.summary: As a child, this young girl was left by her mother to be raped by an older man in order for her to get drugs.
Video.title: Was I Sold For Drugs?

Video.summary: Destiny says that her daughter has unexplained bruises after visiting Brian. She also says the child told her someone grabbed her neck and threw her against a wall. Brian denies the abuse and believes that it is either Destiny or her boyfriend.
Video.title: Did You Hurt Our Daughter?

Video.summary: A woman's partner will not marry her unless she can prove her child is his; Gaylon and Sarah return to the show to have another of her children tested.
Video.title: DNA: Make the Accusations Stop!

Video.summary: Pam suffered two miscarriages from the stress of her boyfriend Miguel’s cheating accusations. Felisha confessed to cheating on her boyfriend Natron, but Natron denies fathering her two kids. The truth shall set some of these guests free!
Video.title: Did You Not Hear the Results?

Image.alt: Did You Not Hear the Results?
Did You Not Hear the Results?
Did You Not Hear the Results?

Video.summary: Steve looks back on memorable stories of DNA clearing up years of doubt and mystery or devastating and confirming people's worst fears.
Video.title: DNA: Life-Changing Results
